sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52206" key="kakoqerh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-θερής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n52206.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unfitted to endure summer heat</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φύσεις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:41" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.41</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
